title: Evercraft
body:
### Minecraft, fresher than ever
Discover a whole new way to experience Minecraft! This pack stays true to the core Minecraft experience while adding a wealth of exciting features that enhance gameplay without straying too far from the vanilla feel.

### Key Features
* **Vanilla Plus Enhancements** -  Enjoy improvements to the Minecraft world with expanded mechanics, new blocks, and immersive features that build on the classic game
* **Skills and Jobs** - Level up your skills with a fully-fledged RPG system using **LevelZ**, you'll have to strive to survive as you progress
* **A Great Big World** - Thanks to the **Regions Unexplored** mod as well as some carefully curated structure mods, the world is more beautiful and immersive than ever, and there's tons of new and interesting biomes and structures to find
* **Automate Everything** - Harness the power of automation and engineering with the **Create** mod! Build complex contraptions, intricate factories, and dynamic machines to revolutionize your gameplay
* **Challenging Combat** - Face tougher and smarter enemies with a revamped combat system using the **Better Combat** mod that introduces new mechanics and a higher difficulty curve, and master your class of choice to use new weapons and abilities
* **Quality of Life** - Streamline the tedious parts of your adventure so you can focus more on what you enjoy, some things are tweaked to be less annoying without being too easy
* **Explore and Conquer** - Explore the world to find new dungeon structures, hidden labrynths, and several bosses that have rare loot just waiting to be claimed

### Play Solo or Multiplayer
Whether you're playing solo or teaming up with friends, this pack offers endless hours of fun with the perfect balance of enhanced content and vanilla charm. Many preconfigured optimizations are included so you don't have to worry about your framerate or server lag ruining your immersion.
